title: Libra Consortium and Halliburton Landmark Collaborate to Develop Field Digital Twin
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) today announced it will work with Libra Consortium, lead by Petrobras, to develop a digital twin for a pre-salt field system in Brazil. The Libra digital twin will help the consortium reduce capital expenditures, accelerate production times, and improve crude oil recovery rate using new insights obtained in a real-time environment. The digital twin is a virtual representation of the physical asset that replicates its behavior and charact.

title: Halliburton Fourth Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) will host a conference call on Tuesday, January 23, 2024, to discuss its fourth quarter 2023 financial results.
